nasb.text: You shall not uncover the nakedness of a woman and of her daughter, nor shall you take her son’s daughter or her daughter’s daughter, to uncover her nakedness; they are blood relatives. It is lewdness.

esv.text: You shall not uncover the nakedness of a woman and of her daughter, and you shall not take her son’s daughter or her daughter’s daughter to uncover her nakedness; they are relatives; it is depravity.

cnv.text: 你不可揭露一個婦人的下體，又揭露她女兒的下體；不可娶她的孫女，或是她的外孫女，揭露她的下體；她們是骨肉之親，這是醜惡的事。

ccb.text: “不可与一个女人性交，又与她女儿性交，也不可与她孙女或外孙女性交。她们是她的近亲。这都是邪恶行为。
